overview: Based on the published agenda, the Wausau School District Board of Education's Committee of the Whole meeting was scheduled to address several significant items including the preliminary 2026-27 budget, employee handbook updates, and meal price changes. The board was also expected to consider policy revisions related to athletics codes and home-based schooling, as well as a major facilities project at Riverview Elementary involving HVAC and roofing work.

agenda.item: Excellence in Action: Thomas Jefferson Elementary
Policy 9270 - Home-Based, Private, or Tribal Schooling (Action Requested)
Policy 2431.01 - High School Activities Code (Action Requested)

discussions.item: Excellence in Action: Thomas Jefferson Elementary
discussions.body: The board was scheduled to recognize Thomas Jefferson Elementary as part of the district's Excellence in Action spotlight series. No additional details or presenters were listed for this recognition item.

Tabatha Gundrum was scheduled to present the Employee Handbook updates for the 2026-27 school year in an estimated 5-minute presentation. The board was expected to review and consider approval of the draft handbook revisions.

Elizabeth Channel, Assistant Superintendent of Operations, was scheduled to present the preliminary budget for 2026-27 in an estimated 10-minute presentation. The board was expected to review the initial budget proposal for the upcoming school year.

Karen Fochs was scheduled to present proposed changes to the 2026-2027 paid meal prices in an estimated 5-minute presentation. Supporting documentation included a meal price action sheet and PLE Tool for the upcoming year.

Dr. Jon Tomski and BJ Brandt were scheduled to present suggested changes to the Athletic and Activities Code in an estimated 10-minute presentation. The board was expected to consider approval of the revised 2026-2027 Code of Conduct.

discussions.item: Policy 9270 - Home-Based, Private, or Tribal Schooling
discussions.body: Dr. Jon Tomski was scheduled to present a proposed change to Policy 9270 regarding Home-Based, Private, or Tribal Schooling in an estimated 5-minute presentation. The board was expected to consider the policy revision.

Dr. Jon Tomski was scheduled to present proposed changes to Policy 2431.01 - High School Activities Code in an estimated 5-minute presentation. This item appeared to complement the broader Activities & Athletics Code discussion.

Ryan Urmanski, Director of Buildings and Grounds, was scheduled to present the Riverview HVAC and roofing project in an estimated 10-minute presentation. The board was expected to consider approval of the Request for Proposal for this facilities improvement project.

publicComment: A public and student comment period was included on the agenda, providing an opportunity for community members and students to address the board.
actionItems: Board was expected to vote on approval of the April 13, 2026 regular meeting minutes
Action was requested for Employee Handbook Updates for 2026-27
Action was requested for the Preliminary 2026-27 Budget recommendation
Action was requested for the 2026-2027 Paid Meal Price Update
Action was requested for the Activities & Athletics Code revisions
Action was requested for Policy 9270 - Home-Based, Private, or Tribal Schooling
Action was requested for Policy 2431.01 - High School Activities Code
Action was requested for Riverview RFP Approval for HVAC and roofing project
title: Committee of the Whole Meeting - 2026-05-18
